description: A graphic in the style of an illustrated travel poster showing a coastal village scene with a curving beach, mountains, and people walking a dirt path under trees. Large white text reads 'HAITI is waiting for you to come home. Fly DHS Airlines for FREE!' with 'DHS.GOV/CBPHOME' at the bottom.
notable_text: HAITI is waiting for you to come home. Fly DHS Airlines for FREE!; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
